title: Fix hot restart and boot message persistence to chat history
summary: Messages from hot restarts and BOOT.md startup briefings are not persisted to chat history or sent to Telegram. They only appear in new blank chat sessions. This fix persists both to session history via addMessage() and routes Telegram notifications when applicable.

affectedFiles.description: Add addMessage() calls to persist hot restart and boot briefing responses to session history
Add optional tags field to Session interface for categorizing boot/restart sessions

estimatedImpact: Fixes message persistence for all startup/restart flows. Users will now see boot and restart confirmations in their existing chat sessions, not just in new blank chats. Telegram users will receive startup notifications when the TelegramChannel integration is added.
